I love drawing and painting in art class.
Art is my favorite subject.
We used watercolors in art today.
quizzes: I really love drawing and painting colorful pictures in __________ class.
__________ is my favorite subject because I love being creative.
We used bright watercolors in our __________ lesson today.

vocabularies.example:
In biology, we learn about plants and animals.
He is very interested in biology.
We used a microscope in the biology lesson.
quizzes: In our __________ lesson, we learn all about plants and animals.

vocabularies.example:
The teacher wrote the date on the board.
Please look at the board.
Can you erase the board, please?
quizzes: Our teacher wrote today's date on the big white __________.
Please look at the __________ while I explain the new math rule.
Can you please __________ the board after we finish the lesson?

There are many books in the bookcase.
The bookcase is next to the window.
Please put your books back in the bookcase.
quizzes: There are many interesting storybooks on the tall __________.
The wooden __________ is located right next to the classroom window.
Please put all your books back in the __________ before you go home.

We play football during the school break.
I'm hungry; is it break time yet?
We have a fifteen-minute break.
quizzes: We usually play football on the playground during our school __________.
I'm getting hungry; is it time for our morning __________ yet?

We did a fun experiment in chemistry.
Chemistry can be a bit dangerous if you aren't careful.
quizzes: __________ is the study of how different things react and change together.

vocabularies.example:

Please be quiet in the classroom.
The classroom is decorated with our drawings.
quizzes: Our bright __________ is located on the second floor of the school.

vocabularies.example:
We go to the computer room to learn coding.
The computer room has twenty new computers.
Don't bring food or drink into the computer room.
quizzes: We go to the school __________ to learn how to do coding.
The __________ has twenty brand new computers for us to use.

vocabularies.example:
The children are playing on the playground.
We have a new slide on the school playground.
Meet me on the playground at break time.
quizzes: All the children are happily playing on the large school __________.
We have a brand new yellow slide on the school __________ now.
Let's meet on the __________ at our next break time.

grammars.description: Dùng để nói về việc học tập tốt một môn nào đó.
grammars.example:
I am good at geography.
She is good at learning languages.

vocabularies.example:
Would you like a chocolate biscuit?
I often have biscuits with my tea.
She baked some delicious biscuits.
quizzes: Would you like to eat a crunchy chocolate __________ with your milk?
I often have two or three __________ with my afternoon tea.
She baked some delicious and sweet __________ for the party.

vocabularies.example:
We need flour to make bread.
Mix the flour with the eggs.
Is there any flour left?
quizzes: We need to buy some white __________ if we want to make bread today.
Please mix the __________ with the fresh eggs in the large bowl.
Is there any __________ left in the bag to make a small cake?

vocabularies.example:
I like bread with butter and jam.
Can you pass me the butter?
Put some butter in the pan.
quizzes: I really like eating fresh bread with yellow __________ and strawberry jam.
Can you please pass me the __________ so I can put it on my toast?
Put a small piece of __________ in the hot pan to cook the eggs.

vocabularies.example:
Bees make honey.
I like honey in my yogurt.
Honey is very sweet.
quizzes: Brave little bees work hard to make sweet and sticky __________.
I like to put a spoonful of __________ in my healthy yogurt.
__________ is very sweet and golden, and I love eating it.

vocabularies.example:
We have strawberry jam for breakfast.

Would you like some jam?
quizzes: We often have sweet strawberry __________ on our bread for breakfast.

quizzes: Many people say that breakfast is the most important __________ of the day.

We use olive oil in our salads.

quizzes: __________ is very healthy for you and is often used in cooking.

I like red peppers.
Can I have some salt and pepper?
quizzes: Please don't put too much spicy __________ in the vegetable soup.

vocabularies.example:
The sea water contains salt.

Pass me the salt, please.
quizzes: Did you know that regular sea water contains a lot of __________?
There is way too much __________ in this food; it tastes very salty.
Could you please pass me the __________, I need it for my chips.

vocabularies.example:
The tomato soup is very warm and tasty.
I like having soup in the winter.
Drink your soup before it gets cold.
quizzes: The hot tomato __________ is very warm and tasty on a cold day.
I really like having a bowl of hot __________ during the cold winter.
Please drink your vegetable __________ quickly before it gets cold.

vocabularies.example:
I usually have cereal for breakfast.
What did you have for breakfast today?
Breakfast is served at 8 o'clock.
quizzes: I usually have a bowl of cereal and milk for my __________.
What did you have to eat for __________ earlier this morning?
The hotel __________ is served in the main dining room at 8 o'clock.

vocabularies.example:
Too much candy is bad for your teeth.
She bought a bag of fruit candy.
Can I have some candy, please?
quizzes: Eating too much sweet __________ is very bad for your white teeth.
She bought a big bag of colorful fruit __________ from the shop.
Can I please have some __________, Mom? Just a small piece.

vocabularies.example:
I like to eat cereal with cold milk.
This cereal has real fruit pieces in it.
Cereal is a quick and easy breakfast.
quizzes: I really like to eat crunchy __________ with a lot of cold milk.
This healthy __________ has many real dried fruit pieces in it.
A bowl of __________ is a very quick and easy breakfast to make.

vocabularies.example:
It's difficult for some people to eat with chopsticks.
We use chopsticks to eat noodles.
Can I have a pair of chopsticks, please?
quizzes: It can be quite difficult for some people to eat rice with __________.
We always use wooden __________ to eat our delicious noodles.
Can I please have a pair of __________, I want to try using them.

vocabularies.example:
Would you like a cup of tea?
She dropped her favorite cup and it broke.
He drank a cup of hot chocolate.
quizzes: Would you like a hot __________ of lemon tea to drink?
She accidentally dropped her favorite blue __________ and it broke.
He drank a warm __________ of hot chocolate before going to bed.

vocabularies.example:
What's for dessert tonight?
I love chocolate ice cream for dessert.
We had a fruit salad for dessert.
quizzes: I wonder what delicious treats we are having for __________ tonight.
I really love eating chocolate ice cream for my __________.
We had a healthy and fresh fruit salad for __________ after dinner.

vocabularies.example:
What are we having for dinner?
We usually have dinner at 7 o'clock.
They invited us for dinner on Sunday.
quizzes: Do you know what we are having for __________ this evening, Dad?
We usually sit down to have our __________ at exactly 7 o'clock.
Our kind neighbors invited us to their house for __________ on Sunday.

vocabularies.example:
Use your fork to eat the salad.
I need a clean fork, please.
The fork and knife are on the table.
quizzes: Please use your silver __________ to eat the potato salad.
I dropped mine on the floor; I need a clean __________ please.
The silver __________ and knife are already placed on the table.

vocabularies.example:
Can I have a glass of water?
Be careful, the glass is very hot.
The window is made of thick glass.
quizzes: Can I please have a cold __________ of water to drink?
Be very careful when you touch it; the __________ is very hot.
The large office window is made of very thick and strong __________.

grammars.description: Phân biệt danh từ đếm được và không đếm được trong thực phẩm.
grammars.example:
There is some flour in the bag.
There are three biscuits on the plate.

vocabularies.example:
We are living in the twenty-first century.
This castle was built ten centuries ago.
A century is a hundred years.
quizzes: We are currently living in the twenty-first __________.
This ancient stone castle was built ten __________ ago.
Did you know that a __________ is a period of exactly one hundred years?

vocabularies.example:
She writes in her diary every night.
Don't forget to write the meeting in your diary.
I keep a diary of my travels.
quizzes: She writes all her secret thoughts in her __________ every night.
Don't forget to write the important meeting in your __________.
I keep a small __________ of my travels to remember all the places I visit.

vocabularies.example:
What do you want to be in the future?
I hope for a happy future.
Who knows what will happen in the future?
quizzes: What do you want to be when you grow up in the __________?
I really hope for a very happy and healthy __________ for everyone.
Who knows what amazing things will happen in the __________?

vocabularies.example:
We have lunch at mid-day.
The sun is very hot at mid-day.
It's exactly mid-day now.
quizzes: We usually sit down to have our lunch at exactly __________.
The sun is very high and hot at __________ in the summer.
Look at the clock; it's exactly __________ now, twelve o'clock.

vocabularies.example:
The party lasted until mid-night.
It was dark at mid-night.
Happy New Year! It's mid-night.
quizzes: The fun birthday party lasted until __________ last night.
It was very dark and quiet at __________ in the village.
Happy New Year! The clock has just struck __________.

vocabularies.example:
There are twelve months in a year.
Which month is your birthday in?
We visited our cousins last month.
quizzes: Did you know that there are twelve __________ in one full year?
Which __________ is your birthday in? Mine is in July.
We went to visit our cousins in the countryside last __________.

vocabularies.example:
We learn about the past in history class.
In the past, people traveled by horse.
It's ten minutes past three.
quizzes: We learn about interesting events from the __________ in our history class.
In the __________, people often traveled long distances by horse.
Look at your watch; it's ten minutes __________ three already.

vocabularies.example:
I hope you get well soon.
See you soon!
The movie is starting soon.
quizzes: I am sorry you are sick; I hope you get well __________.
Goodbye for now, I will see you __________ at the park!
Hurry up and sit down; the movie is starting very __________.

vocabularies.example:
Are you still working?
It is still raining outside.
He is still sleeping.
quizzes: It's very late; are you __________ working on your homework?
Take your umbrella because it is __________ raining outside.
Shh, be quiet; the baby is __________ sleeping in his bed.

vocabularies.example:
Wait here until I come back.
The shop is open until 9 o'clock.
I will love you until the end.
quizzes: Please wait right here __________ I come back with the keys.
The little sweet shop is open __________ 9 o'clock tonight.
The story says they lived happily together __________ the very end.

vocabularies.example:
Check the date on the calendar.
We have a new calendar for the New Year.
Write your birthday on the calendar.
quizzes: Always check the correct date on the wall __________.
We bought a beautiful new __________ for the New Year.
Don't forget to write your birthday on the family __________.

vocabularies.example:
The birds start singing at dawn.
We woke up at dawn to go fishing.
The sky is beautiful at dawn.
quizzes: The little birds always start singing beautifully at __________.
We woke up very early at __________ to go fishing at the lake.
The sky is full of pretty colors at __________ when the sun comes up.

vocabularies.example:
It gets dark very quickly at dusk.
We should head home at dusk.
Bats come out at dusk.
quizzes: It starts to get dark very quickly at __________ in the winter.
We should start heading back home at __________ before it is dark.
Brave little bats often come out to fly at __________.

vocabularies.example:
True friendship is eternal.
The sun is an eternal source of energy.
Some things stay the same for an eternal time.
quizzes: In many stories, true friendship is said to be __________.
The sun is an __________ source of light and energy for our planet.
Some things seem to stay exactly the same for an __________ time.

vocabularies.example:
Wait a moment, please.
It was a very special moment for her.
I'll be back in a moment.
quizzes: Could you please wait for a __________ while I find my shoes?
Winning the race was a very special __________ for her.
Don't go away, I will be back in just a __________.

vocabularies.example:
The history lesson is in the first period.
Dinosaurs lived during a long period.
We have a rest period after lunch.
quizzes: Our interesting history lesson is in the very first __________ today.
Giant dinosaurs lived on Earth during a very long __________ of time.
We usually have a short rest __________ right after we eat lunch.

vocabularies.example:
What is your schedule for today?
I have a very busy schedule this week.
The train is on schedule.
quizzes: What is your school __________ for today? Which classes do you have?
I have a very busy __________ this week with a lot of activities.
The fast train is arriving exactly on __________ at the station.

vocabularies.example:
What is your favorite season?
Spring is the season of flowers.
There are four seasons in a year.
quizzes: What is your favorite __________, summer, winter, spring, or autumn?
Spring is the beautiful __________ when all the flowers bloom.
Did you know that there are four different __________ in one year?

vocabularies.example:
Can you draw a timeline of your life?
The timeline shows the important events.
What's the timeline for the project?
quizzes: Can you draw a long __________ of all the important days in your life?
The classroom __________ shows all the important events in history.
What is the __________ for finishing our big school project?

vocabularies.example:
I'll see you tomorrow.
Tomorrow is a holiday.
What are you doing tomorrow?
quizzes: Goodbye, I will see you __________ at school!
I am so excited because __________ is a school holiday.
What fun things are you planning to do __________?

vocabularies.example:
I went to the park yesterday.
Yesterday was a sunny day.
What did you do yesterday?
quizzes: I went to the park with my friends ___________.
___________ was a very bright and sunny day for our picnic.
What interesting things did you do ___________ after school?

vocabularies.example:
Are you going out tonight?
Tonight is a full moon.
Let's watch a movie tonight.
quizzes: Are you and your family going out for dinner __________?
Look at the sky; __________ is a beautiful full moon.
Let's sit together and watch a fun movie __________.

vocabularies.example:
We have a weekly meeting on Mondays.
This is a weekly magazine.
He visits his grandparents weekly.
quizzes: We have a __________ class meeting every Monday morning.
This is a __________ magazine that comes out every single week.
He is a very good grandson and visits his grandparents __________.

vocabularies.example:
We pay the rent monthly.
This is a monthly report.
I get a monthly allowance.
quizzes: The family has to pay the house rent __________.
This is a __________ report that shows what we learned this month.
I get a small __________ allowance from my parents to buy sweets.

vocabularies.example:
The yearly festival is in July.
They have a yearly check-up at the doctor.
We go on a yearly vacation.
quizzes: The big __________ festival in our town takes place every July.
They always have a __________ health check-up at the doctor.
Our family always goes on a wonderful __________ vacation in the summer.

grammars.structure: Prepositions of time: in, on, at
grammars.description: Dùng để nói về thời gian cụ thể.
grammars.example: At mid-night, on Monday, in January.

vocabularies.example:
It's difficult to see because of the thick fog.
The fog covered the whole valley.
The airport is closed due to fog.
quizzes: It is very difficult to see the road because of the thick white __________.
The heavy __________ covered the entire green valley this morning.
The big airport is closed today because there is too much __________.

vocabularies.example:
Be careful driving; it's a foggy morning.
The weather is very foggy today.
It was a foggy and cold night.
quizzes: Please be careful when you are walking; it's a very __________ morning.
The weather is very __________ today, and I can't see the mountains.
It was a very __________ and cold night when we walked home.

vocabularies.example:
Put some ice in my drink, please.
There is ice on the lake in winter.
Be careful; the road is covered in ice.
quizzes: Could you please put some cold __________ in my fruit drink?
There is thick white __________ on the lake during the cold winter.
Watch your step; the entire road is covered in slippery __________.

vocabularies.example:
The wind is icy cold today.
Watch out for the icy pavement.
The water in the river is icy.
quizzes: The wind blowing from the mountains is __________ cold today.
Watch out when you walk because the pavement is very __________.
Don't go swimming; the water in the river is __________!

vocabularies.example:
The children are playing in the snow.
Snow is falling from the sky.
We built a snowman out of snow.
quizzes: The excited children are happily playing in the deep white __________.
Look outside! Beautiful white __________ is falling from the sky.
We worked together and built a big snowman out of __________.

vocabularies.example:
It's a beautiful snowy day.
We went for a snowy walk in the park.
The mountains are snowy in winter.
quizzes: It's a beautiful and bright __________ day; everything is white.
We went for a very long and __________ walk in the city park.
The tall mountains are always __________ during the cold winter.

vocabularies.example:
There was a loud thunder during the storm.
The storm broke some trees in the garden.
Stay inside when there is a storm.
quizzes: There was a very loud clap of thunder during the big __________.
The strong __________ broke some of the tall trees in our garden.
It is safer to stay inside the house when there is a heavy __________.

vocabularies.example:
I hope it's sunny for our picnic.
It's a bright and sunny morning.
Wear a hat on sunny days.
quizzes: I really hope it is __________ for our family picnic tomorrow.
It is such a bright and __________ morning; let's go outside!
You should always wear a sun hat on very __________ days.

vocabularies.example:
The temperature is very high today.
What's the temperature outside?
The temperature drops at night.
quizzes: The __________ is very high today, so it is extremely hot.
Do you know what the __________ is outside right now?
The __________ usually drops and becomes cooler at night.

vocabularies.example:
It's a cloudy day; we can't see the sun.
The sky is very cloudy.
It might rain because it's so cloudy.
quizzes: It's a very __________ day, so we can't see the bright sun.
Look up! The sky is very __________, full of grey clouds.
It might start to rain soon because it is so __________ out there.

vocabularies.example:
I don't like rainy weather.
It was a rainy afternoon.
Take your umbrella; it's a rainy day.
quizzes: I don't really like __________ weather because I can't play outside.
It was a very long and __________ afternoon last Tuesday.
Don't forget to take your umbrella because it is a __________ day.

vocabularies.example:
Hold onto your hat; it's very windy.
The wind is blowing hard today.
It's a perfect day to fly a kite because it's windy.
quizzes: Hold onto your hat tightly because it is very __________ today.
The wind is blowing very hard; it is a very __________ afternoon.
It's a perfect day to fly your kite because it is so __________.

vocabularies.example:
A cool breeze is blowing from the sea.
It's a lovely breeze today.
The leaves are rustling in the breeze.
quizzes: A very cool and pleasant __________ is blowing from the sea.
It's a lovely and gentle __________ today, not too strong.
The green leaves on the trees are rustling in the soft __________.

vocabularies.example:
I heard a loud clap of thunder.
The thunder frightened the dog.
Thunder often follows lightning.
quizzes: I heard a very loud and scary clap of __________ in the sky.
The loud noise of the __________ frightened our little dog.
Remember that loud __________ often follows a flash of lightning.

vocabularies.example:
The lightning lit up the sky.
Don't stand under a tree during lightning.
I saw a flash of lightning.
quizzes: A bright flash of __________ suddenly lit up the dark sky.
You must never stand under a tall tree during a __________ storm.
I saw a very bright and fast flash of __________ just now.

vocabularies.example:
It's just a light drizzle outside.
You don't need a big umbrella for this drizzle.
The drizzle lasted all morning.
quizzes: It is not raining hard; it's just a light __________ outside.
You don't need a big umbrella for this very light __________.
The very small drops of __________ lasted for the whole morning.

vocabularies.example:
Large pieces of hail hit the car.
It started to hail during the match.
Hail can damage the plants.
quizzes: Large pieces of frozen __________ hit the roof of our car.
It suddenly started to __________ during our football match.
Heavy balls of __________ can unfortunately damage the garden plants.

vocabularies.example:
Look! There's a beautiful rainbow in the sky.
A rainbow has seven colors.
The rainbow appeared after the rain.
quizzes: Look up there! There's a beautiful and colorful __________ in the sky.
Did you know that a beautiful __________ always has seven colors?
The colorful __________ suddenly appeared in the sky right after the rain.

vocabularies.example:
It's thirty degrees today.
The temperature is zero degrees Celsius.
Measure the heat in degrees.
quizzes: It is very hot today, exactly thirty __________ Celsius.
The freezing temperature is exactly zero __________ Celsius.
We use a thermometer to measure the heat in __________.

vocabularies.example:
What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
The forecast says it will be sunny.
Listen to the weather forecast.
quizzes: What is the weather __________ for tomorrow? Will it be rainy?
The morning __________ says it will be a very sunny day.
Let's listen to the weather __________ to see if we can go to the beach.

vocabularies.example:
The island has a warm tropical climate.
How is the climate in your country?
Climate change is a global problem.
quizzes: The tropical island has a very warm and sunny __________.
How is the general __________ in your country? Is it usually cold?
Many people are worried because __________ change is a big global problem.

vocabularies.example:
The humidity is very high today.
High humidity makes you feel hot and sticky.
The humidity in the rainforest is intense.
quizzes: The __________ is very high today, making the air feel very wet.
I really don't like the high __________ here during the hot summer.
You can almost feel the thick __________ in the air before it rains.

vocabularies.definition: A period of unusually hot weather.
vocabularies.example:
We are having a heatwave this week.
Drink plenty of water during a heatwave.
The heatwave lasted for ten days.
quizzes: We are having a very long and hot __________ this sunny week.
You must drink plenty of fresh water during a hot __________.
The very hot __________ lasted for ten days without any rain.

vocabularies.definition: The season of heavy rain in Southern Asia.
vocabularies.example:
The monsoon brings heavy rain to the region.
The monsoon season starts in June.
Fields are flooded during the monsoon.
quizzes: The loud __________ always brings heavy rain to this region.
The heavy rain __________ season usually starts here in June.
Many green fields are flooded during the heavy __________ rain.

vocabularies.definition: The season when leaves fall from the trees, between summer and winter.
vocabularies.example:
The leaves turn brown and fall in autumn.
I love the cool weather of autumn.
Autumn is a beautiful time of year.
quizzes: The leaves turn pretty colors and fall off trees in __________.
I really love the cool and fresh weather of __________.
__________ is a very beautiful time of year with all the red leaves.

grammars.description: Cấu trúc phổ biến để mô tả thời tiết.
grammars.example:
It is foggy today.
It was very windy last night.

vocabularies.definition: A small, rectangular piece of stiff paper or plastic used for various purposes.
vocabularies.example:
He sent me a beautiful birthday card.
Do you have a library card?
She is playing with a deck of cards.
quizzes: My best friend sent me a beautiful and colorful birthday __________.
Do you already have your own plastic library __________ to borrow books?
She is sitting on the floor playing with a whole deck of __________.

vocabularies.definition: A thick, stiff kind of paper used for making boxes.
vocabularies.example:
The toys are kept in a cardboard box.
We used cardboard to make the project.
The cardboard is very strong.
quizzes: All our old toys are kept safely in a large __________ box.
We used some brown __________ to make our school science project.
This thick and stiff __________ is very strong for holding heavy things.

vocabularies.definition: A flat paper container used for sending letters in the mail.
vocabularies.example:
Put the letter in the envelope.
I need a stamp for this envelope.
Her name is written on the envelope.
quizzes: Please put your long letter inside the paper __________ before mailing it.
I need to buy a small stamp for this white __________.
Her full name is clearly written on the front of the __________.

vocabularies.definition: A hard, clear material that breaks easily and is used for windows and bottles.
vocabularies.example:
The bottle is made of glass.
Be careful; the glass is broken.
I wear glasses to read.
quizzes: The clear water bottle is made of smooth and shiny __________.
Be very careful where you walk; the window __________ is broken.
I have to wear special __________ over my eyes to read the book.

vocabularies.definition: A yellow metal that is very valuable and used for jewelry.
vocabularies.example:
She is wearing a gold ring.
Gold is a very expensive metal.
He won a gold medal.
quizzes: She is wearing a very beautiful and shiny yellow __________ ring.
__________ is a very expensive and valuable metal used for jewelry.
He was the fastest runner and won a shiny __________ medal.

vocabularies.definition: A hard, shiny material like iron or gold that can conduct heat and electricity.
vocabularies.example:
The gate is made of heavy metal.
Spoons and forks are usually metal.
Is this object made of metal?
quizzes: The tall garden gate is made of very strong and heavy __________.
Kitchen spoons and forks are usually made of shiny silver __________.
Is this heavy round object made of hard __________ or wood?

vocabularies.definition: A strong material that can be shaped when soft, used for making toys and bottles.
vocabularies.example:
Don't throw plastic bottles in the ocean.
This toy is made of plastic.
We use plastic bags for shopping.
quizzes: Please don't throw empty __________ bottles into the blue ocean.
This colorful toy car is made of very strong and smooth __________.
We always use reusable __________ bags when we go shopping.

vocabularies.definition: A shiny, light grey metal that is valuable and used for jewelry or coins.
vocabularies.example:
The necklace is made of real silver.
She bought a silver bracelet.
Silver is a shiny metal.
quizzes: The beautiful necklace is made of very shiny and real __________.
She bought a pretty __________ bracelet to wear on her arm.
__________ is a light grey and very shiny metal used for coins.

vocabularies.example:
The table is made of solid wood.
We burned some wood in the fireplace.
The house has a wood floor.
quizzes: The heavy kitchen table is made of solid and strong __________.
We burned some dry __________ in the fireplace to keep warm.
Our new house has a beautiful brown __________ floor in the bedroom.

vocabularies.example:
This sweater is made of warm wool.
Wool comes from sheep.
She is knitting a scarf with wool.
quizzes: This soft blue sweater is made of very warm and thick __________.
Did you know that soft white __________ comes from fuzzy sheep?
She is busy knitting a long winter scarf with soft red __________.

vocabularies.example:
The house is built of red bricks.
He tripped over a loose brick.
Bricks are very heavy.
quizzes: The little three-bedroom house is built of regular red __________.
He accidentally tripped over a loose __________ on the garden path.
Individual building __________ are very heavy to carry by yourself.

vocabularies.example:
They are using cement to build the wall.
Wait until the cement is dry.
Cement is used in construction.
quizzes: They are using wet grey __________ to build the strong garden wall.
Please wait carefully until the wet __________ is completely dry.
Grey __________ is a very important material used in most construction.

vocabularies.example:
We made pots out of clay in art class.
Clay is easy to shape when it's wet.
The ground here is full of clay.
quizzes: We made small round pots out of wet __________ in our art class today.
Soft __________ is very easy to shape into figures when it is wet.
The sticky ground in our backyard is full of heavy red __________.

vocabularies.example:
This shirt is 100% cotton.
Cotton grows on plants.
Cotton clothes are very comfortable in summer.
quizzes: This white t-shirt is made of 100% soft and breathable __________.
Did you know that soft white __________ grows on green plants?
Soft __________ clothes are very comfortable to wear in the hot summer.

vocabularies.example:
The ring has a small diamond.
Diamonds are very hard and expensive.
She wore a diamond necklace.
quizzes: My mother's gold ring has a very small and shiny __________.
Real __________ are very hard and also extremely expensive.
She wore a beautiful and very shiny __________ necklace to the party.

vocabularies.example:
He has a black leather jacket.
My shoes are made of real leather.
Leather is very durable.
quizzes: He wore a cool black __________ jacket to the school concert.
My shiny new school shoes are made of real and strong __________.
Real and thick __________ is a very durable material for bags.

vocabularies.example:
I need a piece of paper to write a note.
The book is made of paper.
Recycle your old paper.
quizzes: I quickly need a blank piece of __________ to write a short note.
Did you know that this thick book is made of many pieces of __________?
It is very important to always recycle your old and used __________.

vocabularies.example:
The tires are made of rubber.
Use a rubber to erase the mistake.
Rubber is very flexible.
quizzes: The big round tires on our car are made of black __________.
Please use a clean __________ to erase your mistake on the page.
Elastic __________ is very flexible and can stretch a long way.

vocabularies.example:
Her dress is made of beautiful silk.
Silk comes from silkworms.
Silk feels very soft and smooth.
quizzes: Her new party dress is made of very beautiful and shiny __________.
Did you know that fine __________ comes from tiny little silkworms?
Fine __________ feels very soft and smooth against your skin.

vocabularies.example:
The castle has thick stone walls.
He threw a stone into the lake.
There are many stones on the path.
quizzes: The ancient castle has very thick and strong grey __________ walls.
He picked up a small rock and threw a __________ into the lake.
Please be careful because there are many loose __________ on the path.

vocabularies.example:
He tied the box with a piece of string.
I need some string to fly my kite.
The kitten is playing with a ball of string.
quizzes: He carefully tied the brown box with a long piece of __________.
I really need some strong __________ so I can fly my new kite.
The playful little kitten is having fun with a ball of __________.

vocabularies.example:
The fence is made of wire.
Be careful of the electric wire.
He used a wire to fix the gate.
quizzes: The garden fence is made of thin and flexible metal __________.
You must always be very careful of an open electric __________.
He used a piece of strong metal __________ to quickly fix the gate.

vocabularies.example:
The toy needs a new battery.
My phone battery is low.
Don't forget to recycle old batteries.
quizzes: The electric toy car needs a brand new __________ to work again.
I need to find a charger because my phone __________ is very low.
Please don't forget to safely recycle all your old and used __________.

vocabularies.example:
The car has a powerful engine.
Something is wrong with the engine.
The airplane engine is very loud.
quizzes: The fast racing car has a very powerful and loud __________.
The car won't start; I think something is wrong with the __________.
The jet airplane __________ is extremely loud when taking off.

vocabularies.example:
The washing machine is broken.
Technology helps us build amazing machines.
How do you use this machine?
quizzes: We need to wash our clothes by hand because the washing __________ is broken.
Modern technology helps people build many amazing and useful __________.
Could you please show me how you use this complicated __________?

grammars.description: Dùng để nói về chất liệu của vật dụng.
grammars.example:
The table is made of wood.
This ring is made of gold.

vocabularies.example:
The airport is far from the city center.
We went to the airport to meet my uncle.
There are many planes at the airport.
quizzes: The big international __________ is located far from the busy city center.
We went to the ___________ early this morning to meet my uncle from London.

vocabularies.example:
The engineer is fixing the train engine.
Engineers design bridges and roads.
He wants to be a flight engineer.
quizzes: The clever __________ is busy fixing the broken train engine right now.
Smart __________ are the people who design long bridges and wide roads.
He studies hard because he really wants to be a flight __________ one day.

vocabularies.example:
The fire engine raced down the street.
Children love the bright red fire engine.
I saw a fire engine at the station.
quizzes: The bright red __________ raced down the street with its siren on.
Most young children really love seeing the big and bright red __________.
I saw a large __________ parked at the station waiting for an emergency.

vocabularies.example:
There were many passengers on the bus.
The passengers are boarding the plane.
One passenger was feeling unwell.
quizzes: There were many tired __________ sitting on the public bus this morning.
The excited __________ are now starting to board the large plane.
One __________ on the long train ride was unfortunately feeling very unwell.

vocabularies.example:
The pilot flew the plane across the ocean.
He wants to be a pilot when he grows up.
The pilot is in the cockpit.
quizzes: The brave __________ successfully flew the small plane across the wide ocean.
He says he wants to be a professional __________ when he grows up.
The __________ is sitting in the cockpit and checking all the controls.

vocabularies.example:
The train leaves from platform nine.
Please wait on the platform.
The platform was very crowded.
quizzes: The fast train to London always leaves from __________ number nine.
Please wait patiently on the station __________ until the train arrives.
The train station __________ was very busy and crowded this morning.

vocabularies.example:
The rocket was launched into space.
Astronauts travel in a rocket.
I saw a model rocket at the museum.
quizzes: The powerful silver __________ was launched high into dark outer space.
Brave astronauts travel to other planets in a very fast __________.
I saw a very interesting model __________ at the science museum.

vocabularies.example:
I am packing my suitcase for the holiday.
Help me carry this heavy suitcase.
Don't forget to lock your suitcase.
quizzes: I am busy packing my blue __________ for our family holiday tomorrow.
Could you please help me carry this very heavy __________ to the car?
Don't forget to lock your __________ before you leave it at the airport.

vocabularies.example:
We took a taxi to the airport.
I'll call a taxi for you.
The taxi driver was very friendly.
quizzes: We took a yellow __________ to the airport because we had a lot of bags.
Wait a moment; I will call a __________ to take you home now.
The __________ driver was very friendly and showed us the way.

vocabularies.example:
The ambulance took the injured man to the hospital.
You should move out of the way of an ambulance.
I heard the siren of an ambulance.
quizzes: The white and red __________ took the injured man to the hospital quickly.
All cars should immediately move out of the way of an __________.
I heard the loud and fast siren of an __________ coming down the street.

vocabularies.example:
He rides his bicycle to school every day.
I have a new mountain bicycle.
Can you ride a bicycle?
quizzes: He rides his silver __________ to school every single morning.
I am very happy because I have a brand new mountain __________.
Can you already ride a __________ without any help from your parents?

vocabularies.example:
The helicopter landed on the hospital roof.
Helicopters can fly in any direction.
I saw a police helicopter in the sky.
quizzes: The small __________ landed safely on the flat hospital roof.
Unlike planes, __________ can fly in almost any direction very easily.
I saw a blue and white police __________ flying high in the sky.

vocabularies.example:
The journey across the desert was difficult.
Have a safe journey!
How long is the journey to London?
quizzes: The long __________ across the dry desert was very difficult for them.
Goodbye and have a very safe __________ to your new home!
Do you know how many hours the __________ to London takes?

vocabularies.example:
We have a lot of luggage for our trip.
Where can I leave my luggage?
Don't leave your luggage unattended.
quizzes: We have a lot of heavy __________ and bags for our long summer trip.
Do you know where I can safely leave my __________ for a few hours?
Please remember to never leave your __________ unattended at the airport.

vocabularies.example:
The motorway was very busy this morning.
We drove along the motorway for three hours.
There are no traffic lights on the motorway.
quizzes: The wide and long __________ was very busy with many cars this morning.
We drove along the __________ for three hours to reach the next city.
There are no slow traffic lights on this fast part of the __________.

vocabularies.example:
You need a passport to travel to another country.
Don't forget your passport!
He showed his passport to the officer.
quizzes: You must always have your own __________ to travel to another country.
Don't forget to pack your __________ in your bag before you leave!
He showed his blue __________ to the officer at the airport entrance.

vocabularies.example:
I take the subway to work every day.
The subway is the fastest way to travel in the city.
Meet me at the subway station.
quizzes: I usually take the fast __________ train to go to work every day.
The __________ is often the fastest way to travel around the big city.
Please meet me at the main __________ station in ten minutes.

vocabularies.example:
I bought a train ticket to Paris.
Do you have your ticket, please?
The ticket was quite expensive.
quizzes: I bought a second-class train __________ to travel to Paris tomorrow.
Do you already have your own paper __________ for the journey?
The front-row __________ for the concert was unfortunately quite expensive.

vocabularies.example:
We went on a guided tour of the city.
They are on a world tour.
I enjoyed the tour of the museum.
quizzes: We went on an interesting guided __________ of the ancient city today.
They are very lucky because they are currently on a long world __________.
I really enjoyed the informative __________ of the large history museum.

vocabularies.example:
We were stuck in a traffic jam for an hour.
There is a big traffic jam on the motorway.
I hate being in a traffic jam.
quizzes: We were unfortunately stuck in a slow __________ for over an hour.
There is a very long __________ on the motorway because of the rain.
I really hate being in a __________ when I am trying to get home.

vocabularies.example:
The large vessel sailed into the harbor.
A vessel can carry many containers.
It's a very impressive vessel.
quizzes: The extremely large __________ sailed slowly into the deep city harbor.
A very big cargo __________ can carry thousands of metal containers.
It's a very impressive and huge __________ floating on the blue water.

vocabularies.example:
The voyage across the ocean took two weeks.
He wrote a book about his long voyage.
Bon voyage!
quizzes: The long __________ across the wide Atlantic Ocean took exactly two weeks.
He wrote an exciting book about his very long and dangerous __________.
We waved goodbye to our friends and shouted 'Bon __________!'

vocabularies.example:
The car has four wheels.
A bicycle has two wheels.
The wheel is broken.
quizzes: The fast racing car has four large and very shiny black __________.
A simple __________ usually has two wheels and two pedals.
One of the __________ on my old bike is unfortunately broken.

vocabularies.example:
The rich man owns a beautiful yacht.
We went sailing on a yacht.
The yacht is in the harbor.
quizzes: The very rich man owns a beautiful and expensive white __________.
We went sailing on a fancy __________ during our summer holiday.
The expensive __________ is currently sitting safely in the city harbor.

vocabularies.example:
She is studying abroad this year.
Have you ever been abroad?
He travels abroad for business.
quizzes: She is currently studying __________ in France for the whole year.
Have you ever been __________ to another country with your family?
My father often travels __________ to different countries for his business.

grammars.description: Dùng để nói về phương tiện di chuyển.
grammars.example:
I travel by taxi.
We went to London by train.

vocabularies.example:
I use my computer for school work.
The computer is very fast.
Do you have a personal computer?
quizzes: I use my powerful __________ every afternoon to do my school homework.
Our new home __________ is very fast and can open programs quickly.
Do you already have your own personal __________ in your bedroom?

vocabularies.example:
Send me an email with the details.
I got an email from my friend.
I check my email every morning.
quizzes: Please send me a short __________ with all the details of the party.
I was very happy because I got a long __________ from my best friend.
I always check my __________ inbox every morning before I go to school.

vocabularies.example:
The internet is not working today.
You can find anything on the internet.
We use the internet for research.
quizzes: The __________ is not working today, so I can't check my messages.
You can find almost anything you want to know on the global __________.
We always use the __________ to do research for our school projects.

vocabularies.example:
I sent a message to my mom.
Did you get my message?
You have one new message.
quizzes: I sent a quick text __________ to my mom to say I will be late.
Did you get the short __________ I sent you earlier this morning?
Your phone is pinging because you have one new __________ to read.

vocabularies.example:
The computer mouse is on the desk.
Click the right button of the mouse.
I need a new wireless mouse.
quizzes: The little __________ is sitting on the desk next to the keyboard.
Please use your finger to click the right button of the computer __________.
My old one is broken, so I really need to buy a new wireless __________.

vocabularies.example:
The computer screen is very bright.
Don't touch the TV screen.
The screen shows the map.
quizzes: The large computer __________ is very bright and easy to read.
Please don't touch the TV __________ with your dirty and sticky hands.
The glowing __________ clearly shows the map of the whole city.

vocabularies.example:
I visited a fun website for games.
What is the website address?
The school website has all the news.
quizzes: I visited a very fun and colorful __________ for playing online games.
Do you know what the exact __________ address for our school is?
Our official school __________ has all the latest news and photos.

vocabularies.example:
I like playing games online.
Are you online now?
Most things are available online.
quizzes: I really like playing fun multiplayer games __________ with my friends.
Are you currently __________ or is your internet connection turned off?
Most things you want to buy are now easily available __________.

vocabularies.example:
Don't tell anyone your password.
I forgot my email password.
Your password should be strong.
quizzes: You must be very careful and never tell anyone your secret __________.
I can't log in because I unfortunately forgot my email __________.
Your secret __________ should be strong and very difficult to guess.

vocabularies.example:
Download the new app on your phone.
This app is very useful for learning English.
I have too many apps on my tablet.
quizzes: You can easily download the fun new __________ on your mobile phone.
This dictionary __________ is very useful for learning many English words.
I think I have too many different __________ installed on my tablet.

vocabularies.example:
Press the button to start the machine.
Which button should I push?
The button is too small.
quizzes: Please press the large red __________ to start the coffee machine.
Do you know which __________ I should push to turn on the light?
The tiny __________ on this remote control is too small for me to see.

vocabularies.example:
Smile for the camera!
I took many photos with my new camera.
Is the camera on?
quizzes: Please smile nicely for the __________ before I take the photo!
I took many beautiful photos of the garden with my new __________.
Look at the little light; do you know if the __________ is on right now?

vocabularies.example:
I chat with my friends every night.
We had a long chat on the phone.
Let's chat online later.
quizzes: I usually __________ with my best friends every single night after school.
We had a very long and friendly __________ on the mobile phone yesterday.
Let's go on the computer and __________ online together a bit later!

vocabularies.example:
Click on the link to open the page.
Double click the icon.
You need to click the 'save' button.
quizzes: Please __________ on the blue link to quickly open the new game page.
You must double __________ the little icon on the screen to start the app.

vocabularies.example:
I am typing on the keyboard.
The keyboard is missing a few letters.
Keep the keyboard clean.
quizzes: I am busy typing my long English essay on the computer __________.
The old __________ is broken and is missing a few of its letters.
You should always try to keep your computer __________ clean and dusty-free.

vocabularies.example:
I carry my laptop to the office.
Is your laptop heavy?
He is watching a movie on his laptop.
quizzes: I always carry my silver __________ with me when I go to the office.
Is your new __________ very heavy to carry in your school backpack?
He is sitting on the sofa and watching a fun movie on his __________.

vocabularies.example:
Don't use your mobile phone in class.
My mobile phone is ringing.
I have a new smartphone.
quizzes: Please do not use your __________ in class while the teacher is talking.
Listen! I think your __________ is ringing in your school bag.
I am very happy because I have a brand new and fast __________.

vocabularies.example:
The printer is out of paper.
Can you print this document for me?

quizzes: I can't print my homework because the __________ is out of white paper.

vocabularies.example:
Search for the answer on Google.
He is searching for his lost keys.
The search results appeared quickly.
quizzes: Please __________ for the correct answer on Google using your computer.

vocabularies.example:
Install the latest software update.
This software is very easy to use.
He writes software for a living.
quizzes: You should always install the latest __________ update for your computer.

vocabularies.example:
I draw pictures on my tablet.
Children love playing games on a tablet.
Is the tablet charged?
quizzes: I really like to draw colorful pictures on my new __________.

Is the __________ fully charged so we can use it on the long car journey?

vocabularies.example:
Read the text carefully.
I'll text you the address later.
Did you get my text?
quizzes: Please read the long English __________ carefully before answering questions.
Wait a moment and I will __________ you the full address later today.

Upload your homework here.
quizzes: I am currently busy __________ all the holiday photos to Facebook.

vocabularies.example:
We had a video call with our grandparents.
I can see you on the video call!
The video call was very clear.
quizzes: We had a very long and happy __________ with our grandparents yesterday.

vocabularies.example:
What's the Wi-Fi password?
